pi_items.source: Verified from install_libreoffice_base.sh and setup_libreoffice_base.sh: Database is downloaded from github.com/lerocha/chinook-database, converted to ODB format, and copied to /home/ga/chinook.odb during task setup
Verified from official Chinook SQLite database schema (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database). Table exists with exact name 'Customer' (capital C).
SQL query on official Chinook SQLite database confirms exactly 59 customer records: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer = 59
Task requirement to create new column 'Username' to store email prefixes. Column does not exist in original schema but is expected to be created by task completion.
Verified from Chinook SQLite schema: PRAGMA table_info(Customer) shows column index 11 is 'Email' (NVARCHAR(60), NOT NULL). All 59 customer records have valid email addresses containing '@' symbol.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official public Chinook database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) containing 59 customer records. The Customer table has 13 original columns including Email (column index 11). The task requires adding a new 'Username' column and populating it with lowercase email prefixes extracted before the '@' symbol. All expected row counts and column references have been verified against the actual database schema and data.
